text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy village surrounded by greenery, lived a girl named Olive. Olive loved nature. Every morning she'd wake up och leer at her favorite flowers. One afternoon she decided she wanted an adventure outdoors.

So olive packed her backpack. Her favourite things were books. She loved stories. Especially ones about mysterious lands.

She chose a direction and kept walking. Paths narrowed. Trees bowed. Sunrays danced. Creatures watched. Finally she stumbled upon an ancient cave. Moss hung overhead. Wildflowers speckled the cave floor. Something moved.

Her heart raced. That's no butterfly.

It was quiet.

Olive breathed deeply.

Well. That feels mysterious.

She tiptoed forward.

A glow.

That's gotta be magic.

With eyes wide she entered.

It smelled strange.

Like earth.

Like her secret.

She stumbled.

Something fuzzy grabbed her.

No way...

Olive dreamweaved.

You’re silly little stuff.

She whispered.

That could be.

An
